positive: Minimalist celestial fauna illustration featuring a stylized, elegant crescent moon with glowing aurora tails and a cluster of geometric stars encircling it. The main subject is a sophisticated, symmetrical stylized mountain owl in mid-flight, rendered with deep sapphire blue and luminous gold accents. The style should be detailed vector art mixed with ethereal watercolor washes, set against a deep indigo cosmic background. Composition must be central and balanced, emphasizing clean silhouettes and strong graphic contrast. Lighting should be dramatic, coming from the 'aurora' itself, casting soft but noticeable highlights. Highly detailed, scalable print artwork, suitable for T-shirt printing.
negative: blurry, low resolution, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, ugly, disfigured, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, jpeg artifacts, noisy, grainy, muddy colors, cluttered, messy details
